samples.xml_description:
Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding. 8-bit input multiplicand. 8-bit input multiplier. 16-bit output product. Bit-width of inputs A and B. Bit-width of output product.

Initialize

product [M-1:0] = 0;

for each bit in multiplier B:

for i = 0 to N-1

  • If the bit is set:

    if B[i] == 1

    • add the multiplicand A shifted by i:

      product = product + (A << i)
